description_long: This is a classic, open-top SUV with a utilitarian design reminiscent of mid-20th-century military vehicles, featuring a boxy black metal body and exposed framework. The vehicle has two rows of tan seats, a simple dashboard with a large steering wheel, and minimalistic controls. The exterior includes rugged black wheels with deep treads, a spare tire mounted on the rear, and a jerry can attached to the back for extra fuel. The SUV is equipped with side rails, a flat hood, and visible undercarriage components such as the exhaust and drive shaft. The windshield is upright and split, with two round side mirrors and basic headlamps. The overall appearance suggests durability and functionality, suitable for both urban and off-road environments.
description: A classic, open-top black SUV with tan seats, rugged wheels, and a utilitarian, military-inspired design. Features include a spare tire, jerry can, and exposed framework.
description_view_0: Front view showing the upright windshield, steering wheel, dashboard, and two tan seats, with the spare tire and jerry can visible at the rear.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the open cabin, two rows of tan seats, flat hood, and rugged wheels, with the spare tire and jerry can at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the tan seats, spare tire, jerry can, and the open structure of the SUV.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the open cabin, tan seats, side rails, and visible undercarriage components, with the spare tire and jerry can at the rear.
attribute_wheel_design: solid black rims with no visible spokes or decorative patterns
